name: create_named_range
description: Tool to create a new named range in a google document. use this to assign a name to a specific part of the document for easier reference or programmatic manipulation.

name.description:
The name for the new named range. Must be 1-256 characters.
Examples:
  "Chapter1Intro"
  "ImportantSection"

documentId.description:
The ID of the document where the named range will be created.
Example: "REDACTED_AbCdEf"

rangeEndIndex.description:
The zero-based end index of the range.
Example: 200

rangeSegmentId.description:
Optional. The ID of the header, footer, or footnote. Empty for document body.
Examples:
  "h.1a2b3c4d5e6f"
  ""

rangeStartIndex.description:
The zero-based start index of the range.
Example: 100
